# UNVRS LABS

> AI-first technology studio based in Paphos, Cyprus. We design, build, and deploy AI-powered software for businesses.

## What We Do

UNVRS LABS builds AI-integrated software solutions for companies that want to automate operations, scale without increasing headcount, and leverage artificial intelligence as a core business advantage.

We specialize in:
- AI Integration (LLM orchestration, multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines)
- Custom Enterprise Software (web, mobile, cloud)
- AI-Powered Platforms (autonomous business operations)
- Digital Transformation Consulting

## Our Products

### Energizzo
AI-native platform for energy resellers in Italy. Automates ARERA-compliant billing, OCR onboarding in 60 seconds, AI phone system 24/7, churn prediction, and regulatory compliance. Built with Laravel, React, Claude AI.
Website: https://www.energizzo.it

### Go Ital IA (Go Ital IA Impresa)
AI Company Platform that gives every Italian SME a full AI-powered business. Each company gets its own AI CEO that orchestrates autonomous agents for sales, support, accounting, and marketing. The Agent-to-Agent (A2A) network allows AI CEOs to communicate, exchange orders, quotes, and payments automatically between companies.
Website: https://www.goitalia.eu

## Tech Stack

React, TypeScript, Node.js, Laravel, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Claude AI, Drizzle ORM, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Socket.io, Prisma, OAuth 2.0, WhatsApp Business API, Stripe, VoIP AI, OCR

## Founded

2024, by Emanuele Maccari (CEO)
